items.title: Pizza Night Protocol Activated
items.content: The cafeteria drone now serves extra-cheesy pizza slices after 6 PM. Report any missing pepperoni to Support Bot 7.

items.title: Sushi Station Reopened
items.content: Fresh salmon rolls and veggie maki are back in rotation. Chopstick physics have been patched for improved handling.

items.title: Burrito Build-Off This Weekend
items.content: Join the kitchen arena and craft your best burrito combo. Bonus points awarded for spicy bean stack stability.
